subject: Elon Musk new Tesla battery
body:
Dear Jeffery
I am building two hotels in Dubai
one is Dukes Dubai

http://www.dukesdubai.com, 

http://www.coldwellbanker.ae/areas/dukes-oceana-dubai-palm-jumeirah/

The other is a Maldive style 60 room beach hotel at the one of my World  Islands 
Dukes Dubai should open in December this year while the island hotel might open Sept 2016

 I recently I read that tesla is producing home battery to store solar energy 

http://youtu.be/yKORsrlN-2k

http://m.bbc.com/news/technology-32545081

 Both hotel have access to city power grid so it would be ideal to use solar and keep city grid as a back up.
I Would like to discuss with them utilising Tesla battery to 100% provide power for my hoteld.
I would be the first to use their battery on a large scale.
Can you put me in touch with Elon musk or ask him to refer me to someone at his company so we can discuss 
Yours
Sultan
